summary: A clip from a Fox News interview. A man with a short beard in a dark suit speaks to camera from a remote location with a Washington, D.C., monument backdrop, labeled in the lower-third as DHS SECRETARY. The banner reads MULLIN ON THE ICE AND CBP FUNDING FIGHT, with HANNITY and BREAKING NEWS markers.
